prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-875ISSMFT-2PC-6X4X1 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Stainless Steel 8.75 Inch Mini Folding Trowel 1mm Thick Outdoor Tool Nylon Pouch Description: Keep your garden nice and tidy at all times with the ASR Outdoor Mini Folding Trowel.

The ASR Outdoor Mini Folding Trowel is a great addition to any gardener's tool collection. Each trowel is constructed of heavy-gauge stainless steel, so it wont rust or corrode.

Fully extended, the trowel measures 8.75" and folded it's just 5.75". It comes with a nylon storage pouch for easy organization and transportation when not in use.

Make sure to keep one of these trowels around for planting, weeding or digging. You may also want to bring one along camping, hiking or other outdoor trips. Search Terms: gardening tools garden shovel trowel camping hiking Features: - Dimensions Extended: 8.75" - Dimensions Folded: 5.75" - Material: Stainless Steel - Comes w/ Nylon Carrying Case - Great for Gardening, Camping, Hiking & More === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.75in Stainless Steel Mini Folding Trowel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy-Gauge Stainless Steel, Folds To 575In, Includes Nylon Carrying Pouch, Ideal For Gardening, Camping And Hiking

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel, 1Mm Thick, Rust Resistant, Nylon Carry Pouch, Gardening, Camping, Hiking, Planting, Weeding
